docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, JOSE DANILO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,481.02 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, JOSE DANILO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE DANILO PALACIOS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, JOSE DANILO $2,202.59 PRINCIPAL, $140.07 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,447.66, PRINCIPAL OF 2187.59 PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST PLUS $15 LATE FEE PLUS COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
